name: Deobfuscate or Decode Files
description: Detects use of certutil, openssl, or other tools to decode obfuscated files
query:
// Detect file decoding using common tools
// Trigger on certutil decode, openssl dec, or similar
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(certutil.*-decode|openssl\s+(enc|base64)\s+-d|gpg\s+-d|7z.*-p)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 1
within 120 seconds
